title: Interventions for Incarcerated Adults with Opioid Use Disorder: A Systematic Review
author: Olivia Sugarman
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.69zhh76
materials: Create copy of Excel sheet with beginning download.

steps.title: Apply filters to PubMed search
steps.instruction: Apply filters to PubMed search: Publication dates: 5 years Species: Human Ages: 19+ years Languages: English Sort: Most recent Text availability: Full text

steps.title: Use boolean term
steps.instruction: Use boolean term: (substance use OR medically assisted treatment OR opioid OR drug) AND (incarceration OR prison OR reentry OR jail)

steps.title: Record number of articles without and with filters
steps.instruction: Record number of articles without and with filters. Download results file. Copy and paste into Excel file to screen titles.

steps.title: Begin search using boolean term
steps.instruction: Begin search using boolean term: (substance use OR medically assisted treatment OR opioid OR drug) AND (incarceration OR prison OR reentry OR jail)

steps.title: Record number of articles without and with filters
steps.instruction: Record number of articles without and with filters. Apply filters to ProQuest: Limit to: Full text, peer-reviewed Document Title Language: English Manuscript type: all Publication dates: last 5 years

steps.title: Begin search using boolean
steps.instruction: Begin search using boolean: allintitle: ("substance use" OR "medically assisted treatment" OR opioid OR drug) AND (incarceration OR prison OR reentry OR jail) Limit to: published in English 2014-2019

steps.title: Record number of articles without and with filters
steps.instruction: Record number of articles without and with filters. Download results file. Copy and paste into Excel file to screen titles.

steps.title: Search titles for non-US studies
steps.instruction: Search titles for non-US studies. Considered non-US studies if alternative country name is in the title (i.e. Spanish prisons, in Malaysia). Code with "0-non-US".

steps.title: Sort Excel file by title and authors
steps.instruction: Sort Excel file by title and authors. Select "Delete Duplicates", then select "Title" and "Author" as duplication criteria.

steps.title: Download remaining articles into Mendeley
steps.instruction: Download remaining articles into Mendeley. Read each full text.

steps.title: Use recorded numbers of remaining publications...
steps.instruction: Use recorded numbers of remaining publications at each stage to fill in PRISMA chart.

steps.title: Create matrix with headings "author, target...
steps.instruction: Create matrix with headings "author, target population, state, sample size, time of intervention, setting, study design, type of opioid intervention, comparator, SDH included, and outcomes.

steps.title: Search titles for irrelevant content/content
steps.instruction: Search titles for irrelevant content/content. "Relevance" is considered by inclusion criteria and if primary objectives of study within a title are consistent with the research question. For example, titles of articles pertaining to cardiac arrest are considered not relevant. Non-relevant studies were coded as "0-non-relevant".

steps.title: Search titles for youth, adolescents, juvenile facilities
steps.instruction: Search titles for youth, adolescents, juvenile facilities. Titles containing the words "adolescent" or "youth" or "juvenile" described studies with target populations under 19 years old and thus do not fit and are coded as "0-Adolescent/Youth".

steps.title: Search titles for non- interventional studies
steps.instruction: Search titles for non- interventional studies. Titles containing the words "surveillance", "survival analysis" "tool/measure validation", or any combination of words indicating that the study did not test the efficacy of a specific intervention are to be coded as "0-not intervention" or "0-epidemiological data".

steps.title: Search titles for studies that do...
steps.instruction: Search titles for studies that do not investigate changes in the outcomes of interest, specified in the guidelines of this document. i.e. " Correlation of Internet Use for Health Care Engagement Purposes and HIV Clinical Outcomes."

steps.title: identify interventions for opioid use disorder...
steps.instruction: identify interventions for opioid use disorder that are implemented as part of criminal justice system involvement

steps.title: determine which interventions also include a social determinants component
steps.instruction: determine which interventions also include a social determinants component

steps.title: note any common elements between interventions with significant outcomes
steps.instruction: note any common elements between interventions with significant outcomes.

steps.title: Screen full text articles based on...
steps.instruction: Screen full text articles based on inclusion/exclusion criteria and outcomes of interest following steps 6-11 described in the Title Screening section. Additional screening for inclusion/exclusion criteria. Code following the same schema in a separate column within the same Excel sheet.

steps.title: Count remaining number of articles
steps.instruction: Count remaining number of articles. Also take a count of which articles considered for full review were excluded by reasons why they were excluded.

steps.title: All to be gleaned from each article by investigators
steps.instruction: All to be gleaned from each article by investigators. Outcomes recorded in the outcomes column should only include those described in the guidelines/criteria mentioned above. Not all studies will have all outcomes, record as applicable. Include p-values or other measures of statistical significance as applicable.

steps.title: Summarize outcomes across articles identified
steps.instruction: Summarize outcomes across articles identified. Describe trends, patterns in outcomes, significance, non-significance.

description: Find and read each abstract. Screen abstracts based on inclusion/exclusion criteria and outcomes of interest following steps 6-11 described in the Title Screening section. Code following the same schema in a separate column within the same Excel sheet. Record number of remaining publications.
